checks.action: Install full Xcode from Apple, open it once, accept licenses, then rerun the iOS toolchain doctor.
checks.label: Full Xcode installed

checks.action: Select the full Xcode Developer directory using the standard Xcode selection workflow, then rerun the doctor.
checks.label: Developer directory selected

checks.action: Keep the generated iOS workspace present before build verification.
checks.label: iOS workspace present

checks.action: Run the local CocoaPods install command until MoveBetaPose is installed.
checks.label: CocoaPods installed

checks.action: Run the build-settings probe after full Xcode, workspace, and Pods are ready.
checks.label: Build settings probe

checks.action: Run an iOS simulator or device build and capture a share-safe build log before physical-device QA.
checks.label: iOS build log captured
proof: iOS simulator or device build log

commands.label: Refresh iOS toolchain report
commands.purpose: Refresh full-Xcode, workspace, Pods, and build-settings evidence.

commands.label: Refresh iOS Pods
commands.purpose: Install or repair iOS Pods for the native pose module.

commands.label: Run iOS device build
commands.purpose: Verify the native app shell and local analysis on iOS after full Xcode is ready.

summary.nextAction: Install and select full Xcode, rerun npm run native:ios:doctor, then run an iOS simulator or device build.
